block_00: Check our list of movies and books about trading!
block_01: If you have no plans for the holidays, except for staying at home, fear not. We have prepared 3 movies and 3 books that will not let you get bored. All of them are trading themed, so you can definitely count them as research!
block_02: Start with “The Wolf of Wall Street” for an upbeat mood, “Becoming Warren Buffett” for inspiration or read “Freakonomics” if you are feeling curious.
block_03: Check the full article for more ideas!
